name: resep-dashboard
description: Dashboard admin untuk pre-generate resep & gambar via Cloudflare Workers AI. Publish hasilnya ke endpoint publik untuk dikonsumsi mobile app.

scripts.db:init:local: wrangler d1 execute resep-db --local --file=./schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute resep-db --local --file=./seeds/seed.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute resep-db --remote --file=./schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute resep-db --remote --file=./seeds/seed.sql
